violations.text: Establishment's Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license is expired. Establishment has multiple individuals with active food safety certificate. FMC must re-instate RI license. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2026

Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025
Pork Chops are served undercooked to the customer's request. Identifying symbol is not present with menu item. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2025

Reduced oxygen packaged fish was observed thawing with the packaging intact. Vacuum packaged/ reduced oxygen packaged seafood and fish products must be removed entirely from packaging prior to thawing. Fish products were observed at 38 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Foods were removed from the packaging during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

The cutting boards on the line are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishmachines. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2025
The floor tiles in main bar area and 3 bay sink area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2026
